Bash(PROXMOX_MCP_CONFIG=config/config.json python -c "
import sys
sys.path.append('.')
from proxmox_mcp.tools.cluster import ClusterTools
from proxmox_mcp.config.loader import load_config

try:
    config = load_config()
    cluster_tools = ClusterTools(config)
    
    print('=== PROXMOX CLUSTER STATUS ===')
    status = cluster_tools.get_cluster_status()
    for content in status:
        print(content.text)
        
except Exception as e:
    print(f'Error: {e}')
    print('\\nTrying alternative approach...')
    
    # Try direct API approach
    try:
        from proxmox_mcp.core.proxmox import ProxmoxAPI
        api = ProxmoxAPI(config)
        proxmox = api.get_client()
        cluster_status = proxmox.cluster.status.get()
        
        print('\\n=== CLUSTER NODES ===')
        nodes = [item for item in cluster_status if item.get('type') == 'node']
        for i, node in enumerate(nodes, 1):
            print(f'Node {i}: {node.get(\"name\")} - {node.get(\"ip\")} - Status: {node.get(\"online\", \"unknown\")}')
            
        print(f'\\nTotal nodes in cluster: {len(nodes)}')
        
    except Exception as e2:
        print(f'Direct API also failed: {e2}')
")

Bash(PROXMOX_MCP_CONFIG=/Users/jacques/DevFolder/ProxmoxMCP/src/config/config.json python -c "
import os
import sys
sys.path.append('.')

# Set the environment variable in Python as well
os.environ['PROXMOX_MCP_CONFIG'] = '/Users/jacques/DevFolder/ProxmoxMCP/src/config/config.json'

try:
    from proxmox_mcp.config.loader import load_config
    config = load_config()
    print(f'✓ Config loaded from: {config.proxmox.host}:{config.proxmox.port}')
    
    from proxmox_mcp.core.proxmox import ProxmoxAPI
    api = ProxmoxAPI(config)
    proxmox = api.get_client()
    
    print('\\n=== QUERYING CLUSTER STATUS ===')
    cluster_status = proxmox.cluster.status.get()
    
    print('\\n=== YOUR PROXMOX CLUSTER NODES ===')
    nodes = [item for item in cluster_status if item.get('type') == 'node']
    
    for i, node in enumerate(nodes, 1):
        name = node.get('name', 'unknown')
        ip = node.get('ip', 'unknown')
        online = '🟢 Online' if node.get('online') == 1 else '🔴 Offline'
        local = ' (Local)' if node.get('local') == 1 else ''
        print(f'  Node {i}: {name} - {ip} - {online}{local}')
    
    print(f'\\n📊 Total nodes in cluster: {len(nodes)}')
    
    # Get cluster info
    cluster_info = [item for item in cluster_status if item.get('type') == 'cluster']
    if cluster_info:
        cluster_name = cluster_info[0].get('name', 'unknown')
        quorate = '✅ Yes' if cluster_info[0].get('quorate') == 1 else '❌ No'
        print(f'🏢 Cluster name: {cluster_name}')
        print(f'🗳️  Quorum status: {quorate}')
    
except Exception as e:
    print(f'❌ Error connecting to Proxmox: {e}')
    print('\\nPlease verify:')
    print('1. Proxmox is accessible at 192.168.0.200:8006')
    print('2. Token credentials are valid')
    print('3. Network connectivity is working')
    print('4. MCP user has cluster read permissions')
")
